seo.title: Lawyer in Lahore Cantt | Cantonment Authority
seo.description: Lawyer in Lahore Cantt handling property under Cantonment Board, MEO A-1 defence leases, tax disputes, and civil matters. Cantonments Act 1924 governs the rules.

hero.intro: A lawyer in Lahore Cantt handles a different jurisdiction: the rest of Lahore's rulebook does not apply, the Cantonment Board and the Military Estates Office run their own system, and people get caught out treating cantonment property like ordinary LDA property.

bodyMarkdown:
Lahore Cantonment operates under a separate authority and separate rules. The Cantonment Board administers property, buildings, and tax within cantonment boundaries. Defence land leases fall under the Military Estates Office (MEO). The Cantonments Act 1924 and cantonment land administration rules govern both. If you hold property in Cantt, use the wrong office or follow the wrong procedure, your deed processing stalls, your building work gets halted, or your tax grievance goes nowhere. A [lawyer in Lahore Cantt](/lawyers-in-lahore) must work through this dual jurisdiction.

Saeed Law Firm has worked in Lahore Cantt since 1975. We handle Cantonment Board property transfers, MEO lease disputes, building code enforcement, tax assessments, and family and civil matters for residents and businesses across Saddar Bazaar, Cavalry Ground, Askari compounds, and Walton. Our office is in DHA Phase 3.

### The jurisdiction trap: Cantonment Board vs. LDA

Properties in Lahore Cantt sit under Cantonment Board authority, not the Land Development Authority. The process for transfer, mutation, and building approval follows Cantonment Board procedure, not LDA. Many clients assume standard Lahore property law applies and waste months discovering they have filed with the wrong office. Title verification, deed drafting, and registration all follow separate rules. We confirm your property status, advise you on the correct procedure, and guide your application through Cantonment Board.

### A-1 defence land and the Military Estates Office

Some land in Cantt is classified A-1, held on lease from the Military Estates Office. MEO leases are not freehold; they are governed by the Cantonments Act 1924 and MEO lease covenants, which are strict. Breaches of use, non-payment, or abandonment trigger recovery notices and cancellation. If MEO proposes to cancel your lease, you can challenge the notice where MEO did not follow the required notice and hearing procedure. We examine MEO notice and determine whether MEO gave you legal notice, a hearing period, and an opportunity to cure the breach. Renewal, conversion from leasehold to freehold, and mutation of leasehold rights on succession are also MEO matters, handled through the [Cantonment Court Lahore](/courts/cantonment-court-lawyer-lahore) or the [Lahore High Court](/courts/lawyer-at-lahore-high-court).

### Building bylaws, sealing notices, and deviation orders

Cantonment Board Building Code differs from standard Lahore bylaws. Deviation notices, sealing orders, and demolition threats from Cantonment Board are common. We help you understand the statutory basis for the notice: does it rest on a genuine bylaw breach or poor notice procedure? Sealing orders can be challenged where Cantonment Board failed to give written notice, did not specify the bylaws cited, or took action without a hearing. We pursue representation to Cantonment Board first. If that fails, we file for judicial review at the Lahore High Court.

### Property tax and house tax appeals

Cantonment Board levies property tax and house tax at rates and valuations that residents often dispute. If you receive a demand notice and believe the assessment is wrong, you have a statutory right to apply for revision. We prepare your revision application with evidence of comparable valuations, construction cost, or legal status that justifies a lower assessment. If Cantonment Board rejects your application, we pursue judicial review at [Cantonment Court](/courts/cantonment-court-lawyer-lahore) or file a constitutional petition at the Lahore High Court.

### Civil and family law for Cantt residents

Family law (divorce, custody, inheritance), succession disputes, and [civil law suits](/civil-lawyer-in-lahore) for Cantt residents follow the general rules of Pakistani law but are heard at Cantonment Court for disputes within cantonment jurisdiction and Civil Courts for suits outside it. See our pages on [civil law in Lahore](/civil-lawyer-in-lahore) and family law for detailed information on those matters.

### Criminal defence in the cantonment

[Criminal cases](/criminal-lawyer-in-lahore) involving Cantt residents are heard at District Courts Lahore or the sessions courts. We defend clients in criminal proceedings from investigation through trial. See our [criminal lawyer in Lahore](/criminal-lawyer-in-lahore) page for more detail.

### Where we serve

Saddar Bazaar Cantonment, Cavalry Ground, Askari I through Askari X compounds, Walton Cantonment, DHA-Cantonment boundary zones, Sarwar Road, Tufail Road, and Airport Road commercial areas.

### Forums for cantonment disputes

Cantonment Board grievance office handles revision requests for tax and bylaw disputes. MEO office deals with lease matters and allotment disputes. [Cantonment Court Lahore](/courts/cantonment-court-lawyer-lahore) hears civil suits and disputes within cantonment jurisdiction. Civil Courts Lahore (Aiwan-e-Adal) hear civil suits outside exclusive cantonment jurisdiction. [Lahore High Court](/courts/lawyer-at-lahore-high-court) grants writs and hears appeals against Cantonment Board and MEO orders.

### Why Saeed Law Firm for Lahore Cantt

Fifty years of practice in cantonment property, MEO disputes, and Cantonment Board matters. Familiarity with the Cantonments Act 1924, MEO lease covenants, and Cantonment Board procedure. Multi-forum experience across Cantonment Court, Civil Courts, and Lahore High Court. Broad civil, family, [criminal](/criminal-lawyer-in-lahore), and [property law](/property-lawyer-in-lahore) practice suited to the mix of residential, commercial, and professional clients in Cantt. Same-week appointments and Zoom and WhatsApp consultation.

For property work beyond the cantonment, see our [property lawyer in Lahore](/property-lawyer-in-lahore) page or the wider [Lahore legal hub](/lawyers-in-lahore), and [book a consultation](/contact) when you are ready.

details.label: Common case types
values: Cantonment Board property transfer and mutation
MEO A-1 land lease disputes and renewal
Building bylaw deviation notices and sealing orders
Property and house tax assessment appeals
Family law and inheritance for Cantt residents
Civil and commercial disputes in cantonment jurisdiction

faqs.q: What is the difference between Cantonment Board property and LDA property?
faqs.a: Cantonment Board administers all property within cantonment boundaries. Title transfer, mutation, and building approval follow Cantonment Board rules and the Cantonments Act 1924, not LDA procedure. Many clients file with LDA by mistake; we confirm your property is in Cantt and guide you to the correct office.

faqs.q: Can the Military Estates Office cancel my lease on A-1 land?
faqs.a: MEO can cancel an A-1 lease if you breach the lease terms: misuse of land, non-payment, or abandonment. Cancellation can be challenged in court where MEO failed to follow proper procedure: written notice, specification of the breach, a hearing, and a cure period. We examine the notice and challenge cancellation on procedural grounds if justified.

faqs.q: What should I do if Cantonment Board seals my building?
faqs.a: A sealing notice rests on a specific bylaw breach: construction deviation, unpaid tax, or safety violation. We verify the notice alleges an actual breach and confirm Cantonment Board gave you written notice and a chance to cure. If the notice lacks statutory basis or procedure, we challenge it at the Lahore High Court.

faqs.q: How do I challenge my Cantonment Board property tax assessment?
faqs.a: You can apply to Cantonment Board for assessment revision, submitting evidence of comparable property values or legal status that justifies a lower rate. If Cantonment Board rejects your application, we pursue judicial review through the Cantonment Court or a constitutional petition at the Lahore High Court.

faqs.q: What courts hear civil disputes in Lahore Cantt?
faqs.a: Cantonment Court hears civil disputes within cantonment jurisdiction. Civil Courts Lahore hear civil suits outside cantonment jurisdiction. The Lahore High Court hears appeals and grants constitutional writs. We advise on the correct forum and file in the right court.

faqs.q: How do I book a consultation?
faqs.a: Email ahmadbilal2003@gmail.com, contact us via the [contact form](/contact), or call +92-319-4959420. We respond within one business day and schedule same-week meetings for urgent matters. Zoom and WhatsApp consultation available.
